source_pr.title: *: Add the field of history information in job
source_pr.body:
Handle #1936.
This is for compatibility with previous version. So it is the first step, the second is remove the assignment to the job's arguments.

symptoms: // SetRowCount sets the number of rows. Make sure it can pass `make race`.
failure_signature: // SetRowCount sets the number of rows. Make sure it can pass `make race`.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: Add the field of history information in job.
fix_pattern: *: Add the field of history information in job

evidence: evidence: // SetRowCount sets the number of rows. Make sure it can pass `make race`.
files: ddl/bg_worker.go, ddl/ddl.go, ddl/reorg.go, model/ddl.go, model/model_test.go
